nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: 冠灰纹霸鹟
nodes.summary: 冠灰纹霸鹟（Crowned slaty flycatcher，学名 Empidonomus aurantioatrocristatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点。

links.key: bird-冠灰纹霸鹟-c3ae41d9__distributed_in__loc-内格罗河省-阿根廷-e70d592c
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in southern Colombia, eastern Ecuador and Peru, northern and eastern Bolivia, Paraguay, western Uruguay, southern Guyana, northern and central Argentina to Río Negro Province, and Brazil

links.key: bird-冠灰纹霸鹟-c3ae41d9__distributed_in__loc-米纳斯吉拉斯州-f090fcd8
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Its range in Brazil is roughly bounded on the east by western Minas Gerais, Paraná, Santa Catarina, and Rio Grande do Sul. It has also been recorded as a vagrant in Chile, French Guiana, and VenezuelaRemsen, J
